name: Aptible HIPAA-Compliant Container PaaS API
what_it_does: HIPAA-compliant container deployment platform with REST API — enabling healthcare and regulated-industry teams to deploy Docker containers to AWS with built-in HIPAA, SOC2, HITRUST, and PCI-DSS compliance controls, automated audit logging, BAA, network isolation, and Heroku-buildpack compatibility, without managing compliance infrastructure directly.
use_cases: Deploying HIPAA-compliant healthcare applications via Aptible API for regulated container workloads
Managing Aptible environments and apps via API for multi-environment CI/CD pipeline automation
Configuring Aptible database endpoints and services via API for regulated data storage setup
Querying Aptible audit logs and compliance reports via API for HIPAA audit trail requirements
Scaling Aptible container services via API for automated resource management in regulated apps
not_for: Non-regulated industries where compliance overhead isn't justified (use Railway or Render)
Fully serverless workloads (Aptible is container-based, not serverless)
Teams with Kubernetes expertise who prefer managing their own clusters
best_when: A digital health startup or regulated-industry team needs HIPAA-compliant hosting with BAA, audit logging, and compliance controls out-of-the-box — without building compliance infrastructure from scratch.
avoid_when: You don't need HIPAA/SOC2 compliance (too expensive for non-regulated use), need serverless, or prefer managing your own Kubernetes.

auth.notes: OAuth2 with bearer tokens via Aptible Auth API. API token from Aptible account. Role-based access control (RBAC) with environment-level permissions. Webhook for deployment events. CLI (aptible-cli) for local deployment. SSH key management via API. MFA enforcement available. HIPAA BAA signed at account level.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier; development tier available
pricing.notes: San Francisco company. Founded 2013 by Chas Ballew, Frank Macreery, and Skylar Anderson. Raised $12M+ total (Series A). Pioneer in HIPAA-compliant PaaS. Built on AWS (us-east-1, us-west-2, EU-West). BAA included with Production tier. Used by hundreds of digital health companies. Gruntwork, Stripe, and other compliance-focused companies use Aptible. SOC2 Type II, HIPAA, HITRUST certified. Dedicated VPCs per customer. Zero-downtime deploys. PostgreSQL, Redis, MongoDB as managed databases. 99.95% uptime SLA on production.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for app, environment, and service management. OAuth2 + token auth. Good developer documentation. Webhook for deployment events. HIPAA compliance controls documented. CLI-first developer experience. Credit card required even for development tier. Rate limits not documented.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: App and environment reads fully idempotent. Service reads idempotent by handle. Deployment creation requires idempotency at CI layer. Configuration sets are idempotent by key.
known_agent_gotchas: HIPAA BAA required — sign before storing PHI (auto-included in Production tier)
Aptible Auth API is separate from Aptible Deploy API — two token systems
Dedicated VPCs per customer — network setup required before first deployment
Environment-level RBAC — agents need appropriate environment permissions
Rate limits not documented — test before high-frequency deployment API calls

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. HIPAA, SOC2, HITRUST, PCI-DSS compliant. BAA included. Dedicated VPCs — network isolation per customer. OAuth2 with RBAC. MFA enforcement. Audit logging for all API calls — HIPAA audit trail. Encrypted at rest (AES-256) and in transit. SSH key management. Network policies enforced. Background check for Aptible staff with PHI access.
